components.name: Python
components.boundary: Executable reference projects declare >=3.13,<3.14; the observed patch version is not a repository-wide lock.

components.name: FastAPI
components.boundary: Pinned in E02 and P03; this does not assert compatibility outside their declared Python range.

components.name: Pydantic
components.baseline: 2.13.4 direct/pinned in E04; transitive in E02/P03
components.boundary: E04 directly pins 2.13.4, while E02/P03 currently resolve it transitively through FastAPI; define and test a shared supported range before promoting the repository-wide baseline to active.

components.name: HTTPX
components.boundary: Pinned as a development/test dependency in E02 and P03, not a production runtime dependency.

components.name: pytest
components.boundary: Most reference projects pin 8.4.2; P01 intentionally declares a compatible range and should be reconciled before a single lock is claimed.
evidence: 40_实验练习/E06_数据库异步任务实验/e06_sqlite_reference/pyproject.toml

components.name: redis-py
components.boundary: P03 client library only; it is distinct from the Redis server image baseline.

components.name: Redis server
components.boundary: Validated only for the P03 Compose/kind reference topology and its persistence/recovery exercises.

components.name: PostgreSQL
components.boundary: Validated for the P03 reference schema and recovery paths; production backup, PITR and upgrade policy remain outside this baseline.

components.name: kind
components.boundary: Windows local disposable cluster reference; binary SHA256 is pinned by the installer.

components.name: Kubernetes
components.baseline: 1.34.8 kind node image with pinned sha256 digest
components.boundary: Functional local reference only; no production Ingress/TLS, NetworkPolicy, HPA or Secret lifecycle claim.

components.name: vLLM
components.boundary: E10-03 has no independent Linux/WSL GPU execution evidence; choose a version only with its Python/PyTorch/CUDA/model compatibility matrix.
evidence: 40_实验练习/E10_推理服务实验/E10-03 vLLM 最小服务实验.md

components.name: NVIDIA Triton Inference Server
components.boundary: The curriculum explains system positioning only; no executable Triton Inference Server lab exists.
evidence: 10_学习模块/M10_AI推理系统_vLLM_Triton/M10_AI推理系统_vLLM_Triton_适配教材.md

components.name: Triton language/compiler
components.boundary: Explicitly excluded from the first-pass curriculum and distinct from NVIDIA Triton Inference Server.
evidence: 10_学习模块/M10_AI推理系统_vLLM_Triton/M10_AI推理系统_vLLM_Triton_适配教材.md

components.name: markdownlint-cli2
components.boundary: Pinned through npx; configured rules intentionally relax line length and table alignment for Chinese prose.

components.name: Zhlint
components.boundary: Pinned through npx; findings are advisory after sanitized-input preprocessing.

components.name: Vale
components.boundary: Checksum-pinned Windows binary with repository-specific styles; raw alerts require human confirmation.

components.name: Lychee
components.boundary: Checksum-pinned Windows binary; network failures and access controls are reviewed separately from confirmed 404/410 results.

components.name: Codespell
components.boundary: Checksum-pinned wheel installed without dependencies; scope and ignore list are repository-specific.

components.name: Gitleaks
components.boundary: Checksum-pinned binary; the current blocker scans tracked Git history with the private-key rule and does not prove absence of every secret class.

components.name: jscpd
components.boundary: Pinned through npx; duplicate groups are review candidates rather than automatic textbook defects.

components.name: Mermaid CLI
components.boundary: Pinned through npx for render validation; successful rendering does not establish accessibility metadata quality.

components.name: Repository content quality analyzers
components.baseline: chapter analyzer schema 1.3 plus official-doc and pedagogy analyzers
components.boundary: Deterministic structural checks support human review; they do not certify learner outcomes or factual correctness by themselves.
